diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Capillary malformation–arteriovenous malformation syndrome with RASA1 mutation
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was confirmed through genetic testing revealing a mutation in the RASA1 gene, which is known to cause capillary malformation–arteriovenous malformation syndrome. The presence of intracranial high-flow arteriovenous shunts and cutaneous capillary malformations supported the diagnosis.
